The gas station attendant was very friendly, but on Fridays at 11 PM with only ONE ATTENDANT, there are long lines and it takes a very long time to get fuel. Disappointing.

reviews.comment:
ESPANTOSA ATENCIÓN EN EL SERVICLUB: la empleada hablando por celular muy largo tiempo, haciéndonos esperar mientras se quejaba de su trabajo a toda voz, hecho que mantuvo toda la tarde. Cuando se dignó a atender, pausando la llamada, lo hizo de mala forma, sirviendo el café quemado (horrible) y al cliente que estaba adelante, por ejemplo, le dijo textualmente: "acá está tu café hace rato" (frío, por supuesto), pero como estaba ocupada con la llamada se ve que no le pudo avisar antes. Más tarde puso el TV a todo volumen, entiendo que para que los pocos que estábamos, nos fuéramos del lugar. No se puede pagar con App YPF, no tienen medialunas y el WiFi no andaba (supuestamente), sin embargo el sistema y las comunicaciones parecían funcionar...
Acompañante de trabajo sosteniendo la pared... Lamentable. Adjunto fecha y hora por si les interesa revertir la imagen y saber porqué estaba vacío: Corresponde al 30/03/22 18 a 19.30 hs.

(Translated by Google)
AWFUL SERVICE AT SERVICLUB: The employee was on her cell phone for a very long time, making us wait while she complained loudly about her job, which continued all afternoon. When she finally deigned to answer, pausing the call, she did so rudely, serving burnt coffee (horrible). To the customer in front of her, for example, she literally said, "Your coffee's been here for a while" (cold, of course), but since she was busy on the call, she apparently couldn't tell him sooner. Later, she turned the TV up full blast, presumably to drive the few of us who were there away. You can't pay with the YPF app, they don't have croissants, and the Wi-Fi wasn't working (supposedly), although the system and communications seemed to be functioning... A coworker was holding up the wall... Pathetic. I've attached the date and time in case you're interested in reverting the image and finding out why it was empty: It corresponds to 30/03/22 from 18 to 19.30 hs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXOVpEYzR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala la atención, despacho, y muy mala organización para el ingreso de los vehículos, si vendieran otra cosa que no sea combustible seguro se hubieran fundido... Estaría bueno que reestructuren o les expliquen a los empleados como se debe despachar para no perder tiempo, hasta ganarían más plata si fueran más ágiles... O por ahí están lavando guita al estado, no se... Todo puede ser

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, the handling is awful, and the vehicle entry system is a complete mess. If they sold anything other than fuel, they'd surely go bankrupt. It would be great if they restructured or explained to the employees how to properly handle the flow of fuel to avoid wasting time. They might even make more money if they were more efficient. Or maybe they're laundering money for the government, who knows? Anything's possible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMmRlbnZRRRAB
